global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with geometric shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to stream and start for free.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large rectangle and a circle are centered on the background, both outlined in a lighter shade of blue.

elements.label: Additional geometric shape
elements.description: A smaller rectangle is positioned within the main subject area, also outlined in blue.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The text 'StarVault' is displayed prominently at the top in bold, black font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' appears at the top left in a small, black font, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The phrase 'Stream the hype Start free today' is centered in white, bold font against the blue background.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype Start free today

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in white, set against a blue background.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element is placed near the bottom left, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: An arrow icon is positioned to the right of the main subject, suggesting interaction.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold colors, StarVault logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype Start free today, StarVault, Order now, UGC
